text: What did the man in this story do?
zh: 这个故事里的男人做了什么?

text: When a plane from London arrived at Sydney airport,
zh: 一架从伦敦飞来的飞机抵达悉尼机场时,

text: workers began to unload a number of wooden boxes which contained clothing.
zh: 工人们开始卸下一批装有衣物的木箱。

text: No one could account for the fact that one of the boxes was extremely heavy.
zh: 没人能解释为什么其中一个箱子特别重。

text: It suddenly occurred to one of the workers to open up the box.
zh: 一名工人突然想到要把箱子打开。

text: He was astonished at what he found.
zh: 眼前的景象让他大吃一惊。

text: A man was lying in the box on top of a pile of woollen goods.
zh: 一个男人正躺在箱子里,压在一堆羊毛制品上。

text: He was so surprised at being discovered that he did not even try to run away.
zh: 他被发现时太过惊讶,甚至没想过要逃跑。

text: the man admitted hiding in the box before the plane left London.
zh: 承认自己是在飞机离开伦敦之前藏进箱子里的。

text: He had had a long and uncomfortable trip,
zh: 他经历了一段漫长而难受的旅程,

text: for he had been confined to the wooden box for over eighteen hours.
zh: 因为他被困在木箱里长达十八个多小时。

text: The man was ordered to pay ￡3, 500 for the cost of the trip.
zh: 这名男子被要求支付3500英镑作为旅费。

text: The normal price of a ticket is ￡2, 000!
